texto: Whoa, whoa!” he says as he sits up in bed. “You’re beautiful. There is no ugly now. And I’m sure there was no ugly then. It was only how you felt when you were sick. I can understand that. But I can also assure you that you have never been ugly. There is only beauty here.
explicacao: Citação de Lisa Mondello sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Whoa, whoa!” he says as he sits up in bed. “You’re beautiful. There is no ugly now. And I’m sure …” articula reflexao, beauty, cancer em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como cancer e lisa-mondello.
